description_long: This house features a rectangular, elongated structure with a prominent front porch supported by columns and a triangular red roof over the entryway. The main body of the house is finished in a light, off-white color, with subtle architectural detailing around the windows and roofline. The roof is primarily flat with a central, raised hip-roof section at the front, adding visual interest and shelter to the entry. Windows are arranged in symmetrical rows on the front facade, with additional windows visible along the sides, suggesting a well-lit interior. The entryway is elevated with a set of steps leading up to the porch, flanked by decorative columns and a modest overhang. The overall design is reminiscent of early 20th-century American Craftsman or Prairie styles, emphasizing horizontal lines and sturdy, geometric forms.
description: A rectangular, two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent red hip-roofed front porch, featuring symmetrical windows and decorative columns. The exterior is light-colored with subtle architectural detailing.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entryway with steps, columns, and a red hip roof over the porch, as well as symmetrical window placement.
description_view_1: Left side view reveals the elongated, flat-roofed body of the house with minimal window detailing and a clear view of the porch's side.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain, flat facade with no visible entry or significant window features, emphasizing the building's length.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the side of the porch and the long, flat expanse of the house's exterior.
attribute_entryway_design: Elevated front porch with steps, decorative columns, and a red hip roof overhang
